title: Warframe: Tau, the long-awaited second solar system, arrives with a noir detective story
summary: Digital Extremes reveals the new planetary system Tau, which introduces a sci-fi setting and a detective plot.

title: Soulframe opens to all players for free and launches the Warsong update with dark progression
summary: The new Warsong update for Soulframe is now available for free, adding an 'edgelord' progression path and wolf mounts.

title: Obsidian confirms it is working on a new Fallout and its director responds to criticism about the studio
summary: The studio assures that it continues developing games as before, while its director refutes criticism about an alleged decline.

title: Rounds of game recommendations for the weekend of July 11
summary: Several outlets share their selections of titles to enjoy over the weekend, including personal impressions.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced reaches 2 million sales at launch and Ubisoft responds to DLC controversy
summary: The remake of the classic pirate game achieves great sales success, and Ubisoft offers a gift to the community after the DLC controversy.

title: EA removes microtransactions from College Football 27 after player backlash
summary: The company backtracks and removes optional purchases from the game, although it claims they were included to give users more options.

title: id Software assures it maintains the necessary team to continue creating games after layoffs
summary: The creators of DOOM break their silence and state that they have the staff and technology to continue their legacy.

title: The EU admits it cannot stop Sony from removing physical discs and the former PlayStation head shows his sadness
summary: The former head of PlayStation laments the disappearance of games in physical format, while the European Union declares that companies are free to choose how to distribute their products.

title: Pokémon Winds and Waves leaks reveal a record Pokédex that could be unplayable
summary: The leaked data indicates that the new game would include a record number of creatures, raising doubts about its playability.

title: Creators of Cyberpunk Edgerunners 2 confirm that David Martinez will not return
summary: The protagonist of the first season will not appear in the sequel, according to those responsible for the animated series.

title: Ubisoft officially announces three new Assassin's Creed games for the coming years
summary: The company confirms the development of three titles from the Assassin's Creed franchise, although it does not reveal specific details.

title: Meta removes its latest AI integration on Instagram after SAG-AFTRA criticism
summary: The artificial intelligence feature was withdrawn after the actors' union denounced its impact on performers' rights.

title: Microsoft denies racist conspiracy theories about its mass layoffs
summary: The company clarifies that the job cuts were not made to replace local workers with foreigners, as some rumors claim.

title: Palworld tweaks several creature designs in its 1.0 update to avoid similarities with Pokémon
summary: The popular survival game modifies the appearance of some creatures after plagiarism accusations, while launching its final version.

title: Steam reaches estimated revenue of $11.1 billion in its record first half
summary: Valve's platform registers its best first half of the year in gross revenue, according to a market analyst.

title: Warframe adds voice actor Matt Mercer, from Critical Role, as a playable character
summary: Warframe developers describe the collaboration with the renowned voice actor as a 'dream come true'.

title: Warframe announces rework of its Banshee warframe during TennoCon 2026
summary: Digital Extremes revealed that the Banshee warframe will receive a significant update to its skill kit.

title: Warframe presents a new dungeon-style RPG that could be its answer to Dungeons & Dragons
summary: The studio shows a role-playing game set in the Warframe universe with mechanics inspired by the classic tabletop game.

title: Official Avengers: Doomsday art shows the X-Men in the MCU for the first time
summary: The official image reveals the return of the mutants and Mystique's new hairstyle in the upcoming Marvel movie.

title: Blizzard was inspired by a controversial Viking figure to create the character Thrall
summary: The famous Warcraft character takes his name and some traits from a historical Viking leader who generates debate among experts.
